title: mentha tenageia
intro: Mentha tenageia, also known as Tenageia mentha, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha tenageia include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Mentha tenageia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
